org.docgene.model.globals

Class Localization

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Locales

    public class Localization
extends java.lang.Object
implements Locales
    Hold the localization for the wiki.

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.globals.Locales

        ENGLISH, FRENCH, GERMAN, ITALIAN, RUSSIAN, SPANISH

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Localization getInstance()
      Return the unique instance.
      java.util.Locale getLocale()
      Return the Localization associated Locale.
      java.lang.String getLocalization()
      Return the Localization.
      java.lang.String getName(java.lang.String key)
      Return the name for a key.
      boolean hasKey(java.lang.String key)
      Return true if a key is supported.
      void reset()
      Reset the Localization and sets an en-us Localization.

      Set the Localization for one of the built-in locale.

      Set the properties-values for the Localization.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static Localization getInstance()
        Return the unique instance.
        Returns:
        the unique instance

      • getLocale

        public java.util.Locale getLocale()
        Return the Localization associated Locale. It may return null if there is no Locale for the getLocalization() does not refer to an existing Locale.
        Returns:
        the Locale

      • getLocalization

        public java.lang.String getLocalization()
        Return the Localization.
        Returns:
        the Localization

      • reset

        public void reset()
        Reset the Localization and sets an en-us Localization.

      • setLocalization

        public void setLocalization(java.lang.String locale,
                            java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> localized)
        Set the properties-values for the Localization.
        Parameters:
        locale - the locale
        localized - the properties-values Map

      • setLocalization

        public boolean setLocalization(java.lang.String locale)
        Set the Localization for one of the built-in locale. The supported locales are:
        • "en": En-us localization (the default)
        • "fr": French localization
        • "de": German localization
        • "es": Spanish localization
        • "it": Italian localization
        • "ru": Russian localization
        Parameters:
        locale - the locale
        Returns:
        true if the locale was found

      • hasKey

        public boolean hasKey(java.lang.String key)
        Return true if a key is supported.
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        true if the key is supported

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName(java.lang.String key)
        Return the name for a key. It will for example return "Home" for the HOME key in "en-us", or "Accueil" in "fr".
        Parameters:
        key - the key
        Returns:
        the name
